Video.summary: Secrets revealed ... Since the start of their relationship, Nareda has slowly been discovering more and more of Kenny's secrets. On their wedding day, she first learned that he had lied about his age and was only 18 years old, much younger than she. She also came to learn he was verbally and physically abusive. Now that she suspects he's been cheating, she wants the truth, and she's making a final decision on her misleading relationship.
Video.title: Not A Big Shocker

Image.alt: Not A Big Shocker
Not A Big Shocker
Not A Big Shocker

Video.summary: Russell wants to put his family back together after his 3 children died in a fire. Next, Tatiana believes her 2-year old nephew was abused. And she's accusing her sister's ex-fiance Chris. Chris says he's not an abuser.
Video.title: Did You Leave My Kids to Die?

Image.alt: Did You Leave My Kids to Die?
Did You Leave My Kids to Die?
Did You Leave My Kids to Die?

Video.summary: Marlon claims he caught Bernard molesting his own nephew two years ago! Bernard and his sister accuse Marlon of lying! Later, Tarone found out his sister’s boyfriend Donald molested their daughter. Donald says he mistook her for her aunt Felitha!
Video.title: An Unexpected Confession

Image.alt: An Unexpected Confession
An Unexpected Confession
An Unexpected Confession

Video.summary: Tanisha confronts her man and the dancer who hooked up with him; to try to get her boyfriend to marry her, Brandi has taken extraordinary measures to spice up their love life; Ashley needs to teach her coworker the importance of stripper etiquette.
Video.title: Strippers Shake It Up

Image.alt: Strippers Shake It Up
Strippers Shake It Up
Strippers Shake It Up

Video.summary: Sheila fears that her teen grand-daughter is having sex with a 26-year old family-friend. Then, Jaquella started dating her boyfriend Shaquille when he was a teen. Shaquille's mother is here to confront Jaquella for sleeping with her child.
Video.title: Why Are You Dating A Child?

Image.alt: Why Are You Dating A Child?
Why Are You Dating A Child?
Why Are You Dating A Child?

Video.summary: Misguided youth ... 15-year-old Gala is having some serious and dangerous issues with race and her mother Tanya believes she needs to change. Her out of control behavior has her sneaking out of the house, sleeping around with older men, and skipping school. Gala argues this is the way she was raised, but her mother blames Gala's boyfriend Patrick. With her behavior escalating, Steve's trying everything he can for one last attempt to open her mind.
Video.title: My Teen Would Kill For the Klan

Image.alt: My Teen Would Kill For the Klan
My Teen Would Kill For the Klan
My Teen Would Kill For the Klan

Video.summary: Gloria thinks her sister's apparent drug-overdose death was not an accident, and that her other sister may be responsible.
Video.title: Did You Party With Our Sister and Leave Her to Die?

Image.alt: Did You Party With Our Sister and Leave Her to Die?
Did You Party With Our Sister and Leave Her to Die?
Did You Party With Our Sister and Leave Her to Die?

Video.summary: Today on Steve Wilkos, Steven is desperate to find out who is the real father of his 3 year old son. He found out that his ex, Shannon, was intimate with 3 of his best friends when she got pregnant.
Video.title: Angry Dad Demands DNA

Image.alt: Angry Dad Demands DNA
Angry Dad Demands DNA
Angry Dad Demands DNA

Video.summary: Eugene thinks Shannon cheated on him that he has even broken into her home to setup recording devices.
Video.title: I Know She's Cheating Because I Stalk Her

Image.alt: I Know She's Cheating Because I Stalk Her
I Know She's Cheating Because I Stalk Her
I Know She's Cheating Because I Stalk Her

Video.summary: Robert is here to find out if his ex was ever pregnant with their child. What will the lie detector say?
Video.title: Did You Ever Have My Baby?

Image.alt: Did You Ever Have My Baby?
Did You Ever Have My Baby?
Did You Ever Have My Baby?

Video.summary: Dustin wants a baby with his wife Tessa, but he thinks she is taking birth control because she's been cheating. Then, Anthony says that he's been physically abusive to his fiancee Marie, because he believes that she's been cheating on him.
Video.title: Steve I Don't Trust Her

Image.alt: Steve I Don't Trust Her
Steve I Don't Trust Her
Steve I Don't Trust Her

Video.summary: Katie says her boyfriend, Brandon, is addicted to porn and has caught him sending dirty letters to other women including her mother! Then, 6 months into dating Crosby, Dayana cheated on him and now, he wants to know if their child is his!
Video.title: You Wrote Dirty Letters to Her Mom?

Image.alt: You Wrote Dirty Letters to Her Mom?
You Wrote Dirty Letters to Her Mom?
You Wrote Dirty Letters to Her Mom?

Video.summary: Donnie's wife disappeared with his cousin for hours and refused to take his phone calls; another parent told Angelina that her boyfriend was cheating with a prostitute.
Video.title: Your Story Is Shady

Image.alt: Your Story Is Shady
Your Story Is Shady
Your Story Is Shady

Video.summary: Steve looks back on memorable stories of DNA clearing up years of doubt and mystery or devastating and confirming people's worst fears.
Video.title: DNA: Life-Changing Results

Image.alt: DNA: Life-Changing Results
DNA: Life-Changing Results
DNA: Life-Changing Results

Video.summary: Joe’s obsession with sex toys drove Bonnie to his friend Brent! Andy wants his ex Diane back, but she’s in love with someone else! Kelli’s husband Anthony has been cheating with their neighbor!
Video.title: My Husband Won't Have Sex With Me!

Image.alt: My Husband Won't Have Sex With Me!
My Husband Won't Have Sex With Me!
My Husband Won't Have Sex With Me!

Video.summary: Danny plans to leave his child's mother for a stripper; Richard confesses to his fiancee that he cheated while she was locked up; Dorreon wants to put the kibosh on his relationship.
Video.title: Heartburned

Video.summary: Dustin admits to cheating on his partner with his middle-school crush; psychic Nana says she has a premonition that her fiance is sleeping with her friend; Desiree believes that another woman is contending with her over her boyfriend.
Video.title: Frenemies Attack!

Image.alt: Frenemies Attack!
Frenemies Attack!
Frenemies Attack!

Video.summary: Antiatte's friend and sister determine whether she will accept her boyfriend's marriage proposal; two women battle it out for a porn star's love; Britanny says something is fishy about her boyfriend's behavior.
Video.title: Proposal Do-Over

Image.alt: Proposal Do-Over
Proposal Do-Over
Proposal Do-Over

Video.summary: Steven and Tekla say their daughter-in-law Jamie is their retirement fund. Then, Patricia will reveal to her mom who introduced her to hooking!
Video.title: I'm Pimping My Daughter

Image.alt: I'm Pimping My Daughter
I'm Pimping My Daughter
I'm Pimping My Daughter

Video.summary: Donna, 600 pounds, confronts her blind husband and angry kids about how they’re responsible for her health.
Video.title: 600 Pound Angry Mom

Image.alt: 600 Pound Angry Mom
600 Pound Angry Mom
600 Pound Angry Mom

Video.summary: Paul and Lori have been married for 10 years, but Lori's been having an affair with Paul's uncle, Kenny.
Video.title: My Uncle Stole My Wife

My Uncle Stole My Wife
My Uncle Stole My Wife

Video.summary: Sanqueata says that she’s ready to marry Calvin, but he's not! Rian wants to marry Cherie.
Video.title: I'm Not Marrying You… Ever!

Image.alt: I'm Not Marrying You… Ever!
I'm Not Marrying You… Ever!
I'm Not Marrying You… Ever!

Video.summary: Pregnant Nicole confronts her rapper boyfriend Greg about cheating. Did Carl give his wife Janet an STD?

Image.alt: I'm Trying to Get 9 Women Pregnant!
I'm Trying to Get 9 Women Pregnant!

Video.summary: After 23 years of lies, Angela wants to know who her biological dad is. Is Cody the father of Tanickia's baby?
Video.title: Which of These Men Is the Father?

Image.alt: Which of These Men Is the Father?
Which of These Men Is the Father?
Which of These Men Is the Father?

Video.summary: A panel of psychics give readings about a mysterious house, an unsolved murder, and celebrity predictions.

Outrageous, Shocking Psychic Readings!

Video.summary: Tina returns and is determined to prove her innocence. Will the polygraph results help mend her family?

Lies and DNA Secrets Uncovered!

Video.summary: Is Billy Virinda's dad? Mike signed Timberly’s birth certificate, but isn’t sure if he’s her dad.

I'll Prove I'm Not Your Father

Video.summary: Tina's in-laws don't accept her because of her race. Starr and Willis won't date within their race.
Video.title: Stop Dating That White Woman!

Image.alt: Stop Dating That White Woman!
Stop Dating That White Woman!
Stop Dating That White Woman!

Video.summary: Casey is upset that her daughters are dating black men. Marcus is biracial and hates being half black.
Video.title: I'm Devastated My Girls Date Black Men

Image.alt: I'm Devastated My Girls Date Black Men
I'm Devastated My Girls Date Black Men

Video.summary: Twins Kaitlyn and Kiarra resent their mom for obscuring their father’s identity for 20 years.

Mom Lied for 20 Years - Who Is Our Dad?

Video.summary: Chris denies he fathered his ex's baby. Lillian wants to prove her fidelity and baby's paternity!
Video.title: Your Baby Is White - I Can't Be the Dad

Your Baby Is White - I Can't Be the Dad

Video.summary: John denies Monique's daughter due to her skin tone! Latonya’s dad said her mom has been alive her whole life!
Video.title: I Was Told You Were Dead...Will DNA Prove You Are My Mother?

Image.alt: I Was Told You Were Dead...Will DNA Prove You Are My Mother?
I Was Told You Were Dead...Will DNA Prove You Are My Mother?
I Was Told You Were Dead...Will DNA Prove You Are My Mother?

Video.summary: Octavia and Michelle are carrying Mark's kids! Brandi says that her stalker ex didn't father her child!
Video.title: The Denial Ends Today…Both Of These Babies Are Yours!

The Denial Ends Today…Both Of These Babies Are Yours!
